jobs.title: UPSSSC Auditor and Assistant Accountant Advt No 14-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026 : Apply Online for 1829 Post
jobs.shortInfo: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has Released UP Auditor and Assistant Accountant Advt No. 14-Exam/2026 Recruitment Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this UPSSSC लेखा परीक्षक एवं सहायक लेखाकार Vacancy 2026 can Apply Online from 14/07/2026 to 03/08/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information

applicationFee.paymentMode: UPI, Debit Card, Credit Card and Net Banking Mode Only

vacancyDetails.eligibility: UPSSSC PET 2025 PET Score Card; Bachelor Degree from Any Recognized University.; NIELIT ‘O’ Level Certificate; For Post & Department Wise Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

faq.question: When did the UPSSSC Auditor and Assistant Accountant Online Form 2026 start?
faq.answer: The online application process for UPSSSC Auditor and Assistant Accountant Recruitment 2026 started on 14 July 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply online for UPSSSC Auditor and Assistant Accountant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 03 August 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
faq.answer: Candidates can pay the application fee up to 03 August 2026.

faq.question: When will the UPSSSC Auditor and Assistant Accountant Examination be conducted?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted As per Schedule by the UPSSSC.

faq.question: Where can I find the syllabus for the Auditor and Assistant Accountant Mains Examination?
faq.answer: The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Auditor and Assistant Accountant Mains Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.

faq.question: How can I apply for UPSSSC Auditor and Assistant Accountant Advt No 14Exam/2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on () – Official Website of ®.

jobs.title: NTA Allahabad High Court RO / ARO, Computer Assistant Online Form 2026

applicationFee.paymentMode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Only

faq.answer: Candidates can pay the application fee up to 21 June 2026.

faq.question: Last date to apply online for Allahabad High Court RO / ARO / CA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 21 June 2026.

faq.question: Allahabad High Court RO / ARO / CA Exam Date ?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted as per the schedule announced by the Allahabad High Court.

faq.question: Allahabad High Court RO / ARO / CA Exam Mode?

jobs.title: UPSSSC UP Sachivalaya Vidhan Bhavan Guard and Vidhan Bhavan Fireman/Fire Guard Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 170 Post
jobs.shortInfo: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has Released UP Vidhan Bhavan Guard and Vidhan Bhavan Fireman/Fire Guard Advt No. 09-Exam/2026 Recruitment Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this UPSSSC Vidhan Bhavan Guard and Vidhan Bhavan Fireman/Fire Guard Vacancy 2026 can Apply Online from 09/06/2026 to 29/06/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information

applicationFee.paymentMode: Challan UPSSSC Vidhan Bhavan Guard and Vidhan Bhavan Fireman/Fire Guard Notification 2026

vacancyDetails.eligibility: UPSSSC PET 2025 Score Card.; 10+2 Intermediate Exam from Any Recognized Board in India.; Height Male : 168 CMS (ST 160 CMS), Female 152 CMS (ST 147 CMS); Chest Male Only, : Gen, OBC, SC : 79-84 | ST 77-82 CMS; More Details Read the Notification.

vacancyDetails.postName: UP Sachivalaya Vidhan Bhavan Fireman/Fire Guard
vacancyDetails.eligibility: UPSSSC PET 2025 Score Card.; 10+2 Intermediate Exam from Any Recognized Board in India.; Height Male : 168 CMS (ST 160 CMS), Female 152 CMS (ST 147 CMS); Chest Male Only, : Gen, OBC, SC : 79-84 | ST 77-82 CMS; More Details Read the Notification.

faq.answer: UPSSSC Vidhan Bhavan Guard and Vidhan Bhavan Fireman/Fire Guard Eligibility 2026

howToApply: There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC UP Vidhan Bhavan Guard and Vidhan Bhavan Fireman/Fire Guard Recruitment Advt No. 09-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026
First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category
Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password

After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid
